newsBox.title: 1. 10 Construction Trends Shaping the Future
newsBox.description: The construction industry is evolving faster than ever before. New technologies, sustainable materials, and digital workflows are transforming how buildings are designed and constructed. From smart buildings powered by IoT to modular construction techniques that reduce waste and project timelines, innovation continues to reshape the industry.
